title: Galactic Loyalty Act
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Galactic Loyalty Act''' was a law passed by the [[Galactic Alliance Senate]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. Detailing how member worlds were supposed to behave, it included the [[Anti-Sedition Provision]], [[Law Enforcement Tools Provision]], and the [[Suspicious Silence Provision]]. Any inquiries into the Loyalty Act or other [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] laws would be noted in the being's permanent personal file.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''
